title: HeRa
subtitle: Your personal HR partner
emptyDescription: Ask HeRa for an explanation, your own reminders, or a safe proposal.
memoryConsent: May HeRa remember this for future conversations?
error: HeRa cannot answer right now. Please try again shortly.
memoryDescription: Only preferences you explicitly confirmed, exclusively within this administration context.
noMemory: HeRa does not remember anything here yet.
deleteMemoryProposal: Would you like me to remove this?
memoryProposalPending: I recognise this as a memory preference. Review and confirm the proposal below; nothing is stored, changed, or removed until then.
groundingRequired: I can only answer this with authorised Liquid HR data. Provide the missing scope or ask someone with the required access.
